name: BreezoMeter
description: Environmental intelligence REST API providing real-time and forecast air quality, pollen counts, wildfire data, and weather information with street-level accuracy. BreezoMeter was acquired by Google in September 2022 and its technology is now integrated into Google Maps Platform.

itemListElement.name: BreezoMeter Air Quality API
itemListElement.description: Real-time and forecast air quality data with street-level accuracy, including pollutant levels (CO, NO2, O3, PM10, PM2.5, SO2), AQI scores, and health recommendations for any location worldwide.

itemListElement.name: BreezoMeter Pollen API
itemListElement.description: Daily forecast pollen data for a specific location, providing pollen index for various plant types for up to 5 days, helping allergy sufferers plan their outdoor activities.

itemListElement.name: BreezoMeter Wildfire Tracker+ API
itemListElement.description: Real-time wildfire monitoring API providing area monitoring and precision tracking of active fires worldwide, including fire perimeters, intensity, and spread patterns for predefined areas of interest.

itemListElement.name: BreezoMeter Weather API
itemListElement.description: Advanced weather forecast API providing current conditions, hourly forecasts for up to 5 days, and daily forecasts for up to 5 days, powered by high-resolution environmental data models.

itemListElement.name: BreezoMeter Environmental Alerts API
itemListElement.description: Personalized environmental alerting platform that sends proactive notifications about air quality, pollen, wildfire, and weather events via a single POST endpoint driving the Insights Engine with custom alert configurations.
